get.description: The test session on a Linux platform using Python 3.12.12 and pytest 9.0.2 collected four test items, all of which resulted in errors. The errors occurred during the setup phase of each test in `test_current_json_get.py`. The issue stems from a `TypeError` in `conftest.py`, where the `Retry` object initialization fails due to an unexpected keyword argument `method_whitelist`. This error affected tests related to real-time weather API scenarios, including success, invalid authentication, missing authentication, and missing query parameters.

The test session on a Linux platform using Python 3.12.12 and pytest 9.0.2 collected three test items from `test_forecast_json_get.py`, all of which resulted in errors. The errors occurred during the setup phase due to a `TypeError` in `conftest.py`, where the `Retry` class was incorrectly initialized with an unexpected keyword argument `method_whitelist`. This issue affected the tests `test_forecast_endpoint`, `test_forecast_endpoint_invalid_auth`, and `test_forecast_endpoint_missing_auth`.

The test session on a Linux platform using Python 3.12.12 and pytest 9.0.2 encountered errors in all three collected test cases from `test_future_json_get.py`. Each test failed due to a `TypeError` in the `conftest.py` file at line 50, where the `Retry` object initialization received an unexpected keyword argument `method_whitelist`. This error affected the setup of `test_future_weather_success`, `test_future_weather_invalid_auth`, and `test_future_weather_missing_auth`, resulting in no tests passing.

The test session on a Linux platform using Python 3.12.12 and pytest 9.0.2 encountered errors in all three collected tests from `test_history_json_get.py`. Each test failed during setup due to a `TypeError` in `conftest.py`, where the `Retry` class was incorrectly initialized with an unexpected keyword argument `method_whitelist`. This affected the tests `test_history_endpoint_success`, `test_history_endpoint_invalid_auth`, and `test_history_endpoint_missing_auth`, resulting in three errors in total.

The test session on a Linux platform using Python 3.12.12 and pytest 9.0.2 collected four test items, all of which resulted in errors. The errors occurred during the setup phase of each test in `test_marine_json_get.py`. The root cause is a `TypeError` in `conftest.py` at line 50, where the `Retry` object is incorrectly initialized with an unexpected keyword argument `method_whitelist`. This issue affected tests related to the marine weather API, including success, invalid authentication, missing authentication, and missing required parameters.

The test session on a Linux platform using Python 3.12.12 and pytest 9.0.2 collected four items, all of which resulted in errors. The errors occurred during the setup phase of tests in `test_search_json_get.py`, specifically due to a `TypeError` in `conftest.py`. The error was caused by the use of an unexpected keyword argument 'method_whitelist' in the `Retry` class initialization. This affected all four tests: `test_search_autocomplete_success`, `test_search_autocomplete_invalid_auth`, `test_search_autocomplete_missing_auth`, and `test_search_autocomplete_no_query_param`.

The test session on a Linux platform using Python 3.12.12 and pytest 9.0.2 encountered errors in all four collected tests from `test_ip_json_get.py`. Each test failed during setup due to a `TypeError` in `conftest.py`, where the `Retry` class was incorrectly initialized with an unexpected keyword argument `method_whitelist`. This resulted in errors for `test_ip_lookup_success`, `test_ip_lookup_invalid_auth`, `test_ip_lookup_missing_auth`, and `test_ip_lookup_invalid_query`.

The test session on a Linux platform using Python 3.12.12 and pytest 9.0.2 encountered errors in all three collected tests from `test_timezone_json_get.py`. Each test failed during setup due to a `TypeError` in `conftest.py`, where the `Retry` class's `__init__` method received an unexpected keyword argument `method_whitelist`. This issue affected the tests `test_time_zone_api`, `test_time_zone_api_invalid_auth`, and `test_time_zone_api_missing_auth`, resulting in a total of three errors.

The test session on a Linux platform using Python 3.12.12 and pytest 9.0.2 collected 4 test items, all of which resulted in errors. The errors occurred during the setup phase of each test in `test_astronomy_json_get.py`, due to a `TypeError` in `conftest.py`. Specifically, the `Retry` object initialization failed because it received an unexpected keyword argument, `method_whitelist`. This issue affected tests related to the astronomy API, including success, invalid authentication, missing authentication, and missing parameters.
